title: lycopodium complanatum var. sabinifolium
intro: Lycopodium complanatum var. sabinifolium, also known as the club moss, is a type of evergreen, perennial plant that belongs to the lycopodiaceous family of plants. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Lycopodium complanatum var. sabinifolium include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of extracts or tinctures, which can be applied topically or taken orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
